subject: Add clamp test flow with multiple supported element types
commit_message:
Add clamp test flow with multiple supported element types

Sim-ppnt-3 supports 2 element types.
Multiple element type test flow to test basic acm operations involving
both the element types.

Issue-ID: POLICY-5550
Signed-off-by: rameshiyer27 <ramesh.murugan.iyer@est.tech>
Change-Id: Ic14332b2af0b8f909075a5620e6a0a7ce12224a2
